summary: Iteration 63 — Skill Auto-Suggest backend testing complete. 20/20 tests passed (100%) covering the new GET /api/skills/suggest endpoint plus adjacent-endpoint regression smoke. Verified public/unauthenticated access, empty-q popular list, starts-with-first + contains-second ordering, case-insensitivity, limit clamping [1..100], full MASTER_SKILLS coverage via targeted probing, aggregation from jobs.skills_required + profile.skills + profile.expertise + interview_slots.skill_set, and case-insensitive dedupe across sources. Adjacent endpoints (/jobs [auth-gated], /auth/me, /wallet, /auth/login admin, /interviews/slots) all healthy — no regressions.

minor.issue: limit=0 falls back to default 30 (due to `int(limit or 30)` short-circuit) rather than clamping to 1. Not spec-critical but slightly inconsistent with the documented '[1..100] clamp'. Consider `int(limit if limit is not None else 30)` or explicit None-check.

action_items: Optional: tighten limit=0 handling to explicitly clamp to 1 (currently defaults to 30 via `or` short-circuit).
No blockers — feature is ready for frontend integration testing / release.
critical_code_review_comments: /app/backend/server.py is 1946 lines — approaching the 700-line guideline threshold and would benefit from splitting the skills-catalog logic into its own module (server.py has a partial router split already under /app/backend/routers/).

_load_skill_catalog scans users, jobs, and interview_slots collections without projection indexes — at low scale (535 skills, ~sub-second) it's fine, but at scale consider a projected aggregation pipeline or materialised skills collection.
Cache is process-local — with multiple uvicorn workers each worker would maintain its own cache & TTL. Acceptable for a 5-min TTL on a low-mutation endpoint.
seed_data_creation: None. Tests use existing DB data for aggregation checks (querying for non-MASTER skills already present in jobs/users/slots) and admin credentials for regression smoke.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 63 skill auto-suggest endpoint (/api/skills/suggest) fully validated. Endpoint is public, returns items+total, does starts-with-first ordering, aggregates from 4 sources, dedupes case-insensitively, has a 5-min in-memory cache. Regression smoke on /jobs (auth-gated), /auth/me (returns {user,profile} shape), /wallet, /interviews/slots — all pass. Frontend component /app/frontend/src/components/SkillAutocomplete.tsx not tested (backend-only scope). Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_iter63_skills_suggest.py — reusable for future regression. Catalog has 535 skills aggregated in current DB.
